name: ASRock X870 PRO RS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C - Optical SPDIF Out - HDMI 2.1 - Dragon 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 WiFi7 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: ASRock X870 PRO RS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0
description: Professional ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with PCIe 5.0, optical audio output, and WiFi 7 connectivity.
